personality_family.q: How would you describe your personality in three words?
f: Why did you choose those words?
Can you give a real example?
expressions: Well, I would definitely describe myself as friendly and outgoing.
Actually, most people say that I am quite hard-working.
That's an interesting question; I suppose I am a very calm person.
To be honest, I can be a bit shy when I meet new people.
Let me think for a second... I am usually very cheerful.

personality_family.q: Are you more like your mother or your father? In what way?
personality_family.re: Are you similar to your mother or father?
f: What is one thing you share?
Is that good or bad? Why?
expressions: Actually, I think I am much more like my mother.
Well, we both share the same sense of humour.
To tell the truth, I have my father's patience.
I would say I look like my dad, but my personality is like my mum's.
That is a good question; we are both very organized people.

personality_family.q: What is one thing your family does together every week?
personality_family.re: What do you do together as a family?
expressions: Well, we usually have a big family lunch on Sundays.
Actually, we love watching a film together on Friday nights.
To be honest, we always go for a long walk in the park.
I suppose the main thing is that we play board games.
Let me think... we always cook dinner together at the weekend.

personality_family.q: Who do you talk to when you have a problem? Why?
personality_family.re: Who helps you when you have a problem?
f: Do you prefer talking or texting?
expressions: Actually, I always talk to my best friend because she listens well.
Well, I usually ask my older brother for advice.
To be honest, my parents are the best people to help me.
That's an interesting question; it depends on the problem.
I would say I prefer to solve problems by myself first.

personality_family.q: Are you more quiet or more talkative at home? Why?
personality_family.re: At home, are you quiet or talkative?
expressions: Well, I am definitely more talkative when I am at home.
Actually, I am quite quiet because I like to relax in my room.
To tell the truth, I talk a lot with my siblings.
I suppose it depends on my mood after school.
Let me think... I am usually the loudest person in the house!

personality_family.q: What is one good habit you learned from your family?
personality_family.re: What good habit did your family teach you?
f: How do you use it today?
Do you want to teach it to others?
expressions: Actually, my parents taught me to always be on time.
Well, I learned how to save my pocket money carefully.
That's a great question; they taught me to be polite to everyone.
To be honest, my family showed me the importance of reading.
I would say the best habit is eating dinner together at the table.

personality_family.q: Do you think personality can change as you grow older? Why / why not?
expressions: Well, I absolutely believe that people can change over time.
Actually, experiences in life can make you more confident.
That's an interesting question; I think our basic character stays the same.
To be honest, I am much less shy now than I was as a child.
I suppose you learn from your mistakes and become wiser.

personality_family.q: Who is the funniest person in your family? What makes them funny?
personality_family.re: Who is the funniest in your family?
expressions: Actually, my uncle is definitely the funniest person I know.
Well, my dad tells the best jokes, even if they are a bit silly.
To tell the truth, my younger sister always makes me laugh.
Let me think... my grandad has a brilliant sense of humour.
I would say my brother, because he does great impressions of people.

personality_family.q: How is your personality different with friends and with family?
personality_family.re: Are you different with friends vs family?
expressions: Well, I am probably more relaxed and crazy with my friends.
Actually, I think I am exactly the same with everyone.
To be honest, I am a bit more serious when I am with my parents.
That's an interesting question; I show different sides of myself.
I suppose I am more talkative when I am hanging out with my mates.

personality_family.q: What is one thing you would like your family to understand better about you?
personality_family.re: What should your family understand about you?
expressions: Actually, I wish they understood that I need more privacy.
Well, I would like them to see that I am growing up and need independence.
To be honest, I want them to understand my taste in music.
That's a tricky question; maybe that I study better late at night.
Let me think... I just wish they wouldn't worry about me so much.

home_area.q: Do you live in a flat or a house? What do you like about it?
home_area.re: Do you live in a flat or a house? What’s good about it?
expressions: Well, I live in a modern flat, and I really love the balcony.
Actually, we live in a detached house with a lovely garden.
To be honest, I live in a small apartment, but it is very cosy.
That's a good question; my house is great because it is in a quiet area.
Let me think... I live in a flat, and the best part is the view.

home_area.q: What is your neighbourhood like: quiet, busy, friendly, boring?
expressions: Actually, my neighbourhood is quite peaceful and safe.
Well, it is a very busy area with lots of shops and cafes.
To tell the truth, it can be a little bit boring for teenagers.
I would say the people are incredibly friendly and helpful.
That's an interesting question; it is very noisy because of the traffic.

home_area.q: Is there a place near your home where you like to spend time?
home_area.re: Where do you like to go near your home?
expressions: Well, there is a beautiful park just five minutes away.
Actually, I love going to the local leisure centre.
To be honest, I usually just hang out at the shopping centre.
I suppose my favourite place is the small café down the street.
Let me see... I spend a lot of time at the football pitch nearby.

home_area.q: What do you like most about the town or village where you live?
home_area.re: What’s the best thing about your town/village?
expressions: Actually, the best thing is that public transport is excellent.
Well, I really love the historical buildings in the centre.
To tell the truth, I like it because all my friends live close by.
That's an interesting question; the surrounding nature is stunning.
I would say the local festivals make it a great place to live.

home_area.q: What is one problem in your neighbourhood?
home_area.re: What problem does your neighbourhood have?
expressions: Well, the biggest problem is definitely the lack of parking spaces.
Actually, there is quite a lot of litter on the streets sometimes.
To be honest, public transport doesn't run very often at night.
I suppose we need more facilities for young people, like a youth club.
Let me think... the traffic during rush hour is terrible.

home_area.q: Do you know your neighbours well, or not really?
f: Is that common where you live?
Would you like to know them better?
expressions: Actually, we know the family next door very well.
Well, we always say hello, but we are not close friends.
To tell the truth, I don't really know anyone in my building.
That's a good question; my parents chat with them, but I don't.
I would say we have a very friendly relationship with them.

home_area.q: Is your home more for relaxing or for studying? Why?
home_area.re: At home, do you relax or study more?
expressions: Well, I try to use my bedroom strictly for studying.
Actually, my home is definitely a place for relaxing after school.
To be honest, it is a mix of both, depending on the day.
I suppose the living room is for resting, and my desk is for work.
Let me think... I find it hard to study at home because it's too comfortable.

home_area.q: How far is your school from your home, and how do you get there?
home_area.re: How do you travel to school?
expressions: Actually, it is quite near, so I usually just walk.
Well, I have to catch the bus at 7:30 every morning.
To tell the truth, my parents drive me because it is far away.
That's an interesting question; I cycle when the weather is nice.
I would say it takes about half an hour by underground.

home_area.q: Would you like to live somewhere else in the future? Where?
home_area.re: Would you move in the future? Where?
expressions: Well, I would absolutely love to live in a big city like London.
Actually, I dream of moving to a house near the seaside.
To be honest, I am very happy here and want to stay.
I suppose I would like to live abroad for a few years.
Let me think... maybe somewhere with a warmer climate!

home_area.q: What would you change about your home or neighbourhood if you could?
home_area.re: If you could change one thing, what would it be?
expressions: Actually, I would paint my bedroom a brighter colour.
Well, I wish we had a bigger garden for our dog.
That's a great question; I would build a new cinema in our town.
To tell the truth, I would reduce the amount of traffic on our street.
I would say planting more trees would make the area much nicer.

health_sports.q: What do you do to stay healthy?
expressions: Actually, I try to eat a lot of fresh fruit and vegetables.
Well, I go for a run in the park twice a week.
To tell the truth, I avoid eating too much fast food.
That is an interesting question; I make sure to get eight hours of sleep.
Let me see... I drink plenty of water and stay active.

health_sports.q: Do you play any sport or do any regular exercise? Why / why not?
health_sports.re: Do you do sport? Why / why not?
expressions: Well, I play football for a local team every Saturday.
Actually, I am not very sporty, but I enjoy cycling.
To be honest, I prefer working out at the gym.
I suppose I should do more, but I am often too busy with homework.
Let me think... I go swimming because it is great for the whole body.

health_sports.q: What is your favourite sport to watch and to do?
health_sports.re: What sport do you like to watch and do?
expressions: Actually, I absolutely love watching tennis matches on TV.
Well, basketball is my favourite to play because it's so fast.
To tell the truth, I don't really enjoy watching sports.
That's a good question; Formula 1 is really exciting to watch.
I would say volleyball is the most fun to play with friends.

health_sports.q: How important is sleep for you on school days?
health_sports.re: Is sleep important for you on school days?
f: How many hours do you get?
What happens if you sleep less?
expressions: Well, it is extremely important, otherwise I cannot concentrate.
Actually, I always try to be in bed by 10 PM.
To be honest, I am usually very tired in the mornings.
I suppose I need at least eight hours to feel fresh.
Let me think... if I don't sleep well, I get headaches at school.

health_sports.q: What food do you think is healthy but you don’t really like?
health_sports.re: What healthy food do you dislike?
expressions: Actually, I know broccoli is very good for you, but I hate the taste.
Well, I really cannot stand eating fish, even though it's healthy.
To tell the truth, I try to eat spinach, but I don't enjoy it.
That's an interesting question; I avoid plain yogurt if I can.
I would say salads can be quite boring without a good dressing.

health_sports.q: How much time do you spend sitting every day?
health_sports.re: How much do you sit every day?
f: When do you sit the most?
expressions: Well, I spend at least six hours sitting at my desk at school.
Actually, I sit too much, especially when I am doing homework.
To be honest, I try to stand up and stretch every hour.
I suppose I spend most of my evening sitting in front of a screen.
Let me see... I walk a lot, so maybe I don't sit as much as others.

health_sports.q: What do you do when you feel stressed or tired?
health_sports.re: What helps you when you’re stressed or tired?
expressions: Actually, listening to my favourite music helps me to calm down.
Well, I usually take a hot shower and go straight to bed.
To tell the truth, talking to my best friend makes me feel better.
That's a great question; going for a walk clears my head.
I would say reading a good book helps me to relax completely.

health_sports.q: Is competition good or bad in sports? Why?
health_sports.re: Is competition good or bad in sport?
expressions: Well, I think a little bit of competition motivates people to improve.
Actually, it can be bad if players become too aggressive.
To be honest, I prefer playing just for fun and fitness.
I suppose it teaches you how to win and lose gracefully.
Let me think... professional competition is exciting, but school sports should be fun.

health_sports.q: Do you think teenagers have enough exercise today? Why / why not?
expressions: Actually, I think many teenagers spend too much time on their phones.
Well, some do, but others have very inactive lifestyles.
To tell the truth, PE lessons at school are not always enough.
That's an interesting question; I think we sit down way too much.
I would say it depends on whether they find a sport they actually enjoy.

health_sports.q: What small change could make your lifestyle healthier?
health_sports.re: What small change would help your health?
expressions: Well, I should definitely drink less sugary cola.
Actually, going to bed thirty minutes earlier would make a huge difference.
To be honest, I could easily walk to the shops instead of taking the bus.
I suppose eating a proper breakfast every morning is a good start.
Let me think... stretching for ten minutes every day would be great.

daily_routine.q: What time do you usually wake up on school days?
daily_routine.re: When do you wake up on school days?
f: What time do you go to bed?
expressions: Well, my alarm always goes off at half past six.
Actually, I have to wake up very early because my school is far away.
To tell the truth, I find it incredibly difficult to get out of bed.
That's an interesting question; I usually wake up at 7 AM exactly.
Let me think... I wake up at 6:45, but I stay in bed for ten more minutes.

daily_routine.q: What is the first thing you do in the morning?
daily_routine.re: What do you do first in the morning?
expressions: Actually, the very first thing I do is check my messages.
Well, I usually go straight to the bathroom to wash my face.
To be honest, I go to the kitchen and make a cup of tea.
I suppose I always open the window to get some fresh air.
Let me see... I pack my school bag because I am always in a hurry.

daily_routine.q: What part of the school day do you like the most? Why?
daily_routine.re: Which part of school do you like most?
expressions: Well, my favourite part is definitely the lunch break.
Actually, I really enjoy English lessons because we do fun activities.
To tell the truth, going home at the end of the day is the best feeling!
That's a good question; I like the mornings when I have the most energy.
I would say PE lessons, because we get to move around outside.

daily_routine.q: What do you usually do after school?
daily_routine.re: What do you do after school?
expressions: Actually, I usually have basketball training twice a week.
Well, I go home, have a snack, and then start my homework immediately.
To be honest, I just collapse on the sofa and watch some YouTube.
I suppose I often meet up with my friends in the park.
Let me think... I have to walk the dog as soon as I get in.

daily_routine.q: How much time do you spend on homework every day?
daily_routine.re: How long do you do homework?
f: Do you study well at home?
expressions: Well, it usually takes me about an hour and a half.
Actually, it depends on the day, but normally around two hours.
To tell the truth, Maths usually takes up most of my time.
That's an interesting question; I try to finish it as quickly as possible.
I would say I spend too much time on it because I get easily distracted.

daily_routine.q: How much time do you spend on your phone or computer?
daily_routine.re: How long are you on your phone/computer?
expressions: Actually, I probably spend around three hours a day on my phone.
Well, I use my computer a lot for school projects and gaming.
To be honest, I think I spend way too much time scrolling through social media.
I suppose it is about two hours, mainly texting my friends.
Let me think... I try to limit my screen time in the evenings.

daily_routine.q: What do you do in the evening to relax?
daily_routine.re: How do you relax in the evening?
expressions: Well, I love to watch an episode of my favourite TV series.
Actually, reading a book before bed really helps me to relax.
To tell the truth, I enjoy playing video games to switch off my brain.
That's a great question; sometimes I just listen to a podcast.
I would say having a chat with my family in the living room is nice.

daily_routine.q: Is your daily routine the same every day, or different?
daily_routine.re: Is your routine the same or different?
expressions: Actually, during the week, my routine is exactly the same every day.
Well, the weekends are completely different because I sleep in.
To be honest, it changes a bit depending on my afternoon clubs.
I suppose it is quite repetitive, which can be a bit boring.
Let me think... my routine changes a lot during the school holidays.

daily_routine.q: What is one thing you waste too much time on?
daily_routine.re: What do you waste time on?
expressions: Well, I definitely waste too much time watching short videos online.
Actually, I spend ages just deciding what to wear in the morning.
To tell the truth, I often procrastinate when I should be studying.
That's an interesting question; playing games on my phone takes up hours.
I would say I waste time worrying about things that don't matter.

daily_routine.q: What would your perfect weekday look like?
expressions: Actually, my perfect weekday would start at 10 AM, not 7 AM!
Well, I would only have subjects like Art and PE at school.
To be honest, I would love to have zero homework in the afternoon.
I suppose I would spend the whole evening hanging out with my best friend.
Let me think... we would have pizza for lunch every single day.

environment.re: How do you recycle at home?
expressions: Well, we always separate paper, plastic, and glass into different bins.
Actually, my parents are very strict about recycling everything we can.
To tell the truth, we try our best, but sometimes it is confusing.
That's an interesting question; yes, our local council collects recycling weekly.
Let me think... we even have a compost bin in the garden for food waste.

environment.q: Is pollution a problem in your town?
environment.re: What about pollution in your town?
f: Is it air or water pollution?
expressions: Actually, air pollution from traffic is quite bad in the centre.
Well, thankfully, we live in a green area, so the air is very clean.
To be honest, there is a lot of litter in the local parks.
I suppose the main issue is the noise pollution from the nearby motorway.
Let me see... the river used to be polluted, but it is much cleaner now.

environment.q: Do you use public transport often?
environment.re: Do you use buses or trains?
expressions: Well, I take the bus to school every single morning.
Actually, I prefer to walk or cycle because it is better for the environment.
To tell the truth, public transport here is quite expensive.
That's a good question; I use the train when I visit the big city.
I would say I use it a lot, but unfortunately, it is often delayed.

environment.q: How do you save energy at home?
environment.re: What do you do to save electricity?
expressions: Actually, I always make sure to turn off the lights when I leave a room.
Well, we try not to leave the TV or computer on standby.
To be honest, we recently installed energy-saving bulbs in the whole house.
I suppose we also turn the heating down a bit in the winter.
Let me think... I try to take shorter showers to save hot water.

environment.re: Is organic food important for you?
expressions: Well, my mum buys organic vegetables at the local market when she can.
Actually, I think organic food is a bit too expensive for us to buy every day.
To tell the truth, I don't really check if the food I eat is organic.
That's an interesting question; I prefer food that is grown locally.
I would say it tastes better, but it's not always easy to find.

environment.q: Do you like spending time in nature?
environment.re: What do you do in nature?
expressions: Actually, I absolutely love hiking in the mountains at the weekend.
Well, walking in the forest always helps me to relax and clear my head.
To be honest, I prefer the beach, especially when the weather is warm.
I suppose I don't go out into nature as much as I would like to.
Let me think... camping is my favourite way to spend time outdoors.

environment.q: What is the biggest environmental problem today?
expressions: Well, I think climate change is definitely the most serious issue.
Actually, the amount of plastic waste in the oceans is terrible.
To tell the truth, global warming is causing a lot of extreme weather.
That's a very difficult question; probably the destruction of the rainforests.
I would say that people consuming too much is the root of the problem.

environment.q: Do you prefer plastic or paper bags?
expressions: Actually, I always try to bring a reusable cotton bag when I go shopping.
Well, paper bags are definitely much better for the environment.
To be honest, sometimes I forget and have to buy a plastic one.
I suppose paper is better, but it breaks easily if it is raining.
Let me think... supermarkets should ban single-use plastic bags completely.
Well, we have recycling bins in every single classroom.
Actually, my school recently installed solar panels on the roof.
To tell the truth, they print far too much on paper instead of using tablets.
That's an interesting question; we have an eco-club that plants trees.
I would say it is okay, but they could definitely do more to save energy.

environment.q: Would you like to live in an eco-city?
environment.re: Would you live in a very green city?
expressions: Actually, I would love that; it sounds very clean and quiet.
Well, if there were no cars and lots of parks, it would be perfect.
To be honest, it might be a bit strange at first, but very healthy.
I suppose the air quality would be amazing compared to normal cities.
Let me think... yes, especially if the buildings had gardens on the roofs!
Well, I have always wanted to be a software engineer.
Actually, my absolute dream is to work as a graphic designer.
To tell the truth, I would love to be a travel journalist and see the world.
That's a great question; I think being a teacher would be very rewarding.
Let me think... I want to do something creative, maybe in architecture.

work_life.q: Would you like to work in an office?
f: What is a typical day like?
expressions: Actually, I think sitting at a desk all day would be quite boring.
Well, I wouldn't mind it if the office was modern and friendly.
To be honest, I prefer to have a job where I am moving around.
I suppose it depends on the colleagues; a good team makes a huge difference.
Let me see... maybe a mix of working from home and the office.

work_life.re: Do you care about money in a job?
f: Would you work for less if it's fun?
expressions: Well, you need money to live comfortably, so yes, it is important.
Actually, I think enjoying what you do is far more important than money.
To tell the truth, a high salary is great, but not if the job is too stressful.
That's an interesting question; a good work-life balance is my priority.
I would say it is important, but a friendly atmosphere matters too.

work_life.q: Do you want to work abroad?
work_life.re: Would you work in another country?
expressions: Actually, I would love to work in an English-speaking country for a few years.
Well, gaining international experience would be fantastic for my CV.
To be honest, I think I would miss my family and friends too much.
I suppose working abroad could teach me about different cultures.
Let me think... maybe in the future, if a good opportunity comes up.

work_life.q: Is teamwork better than working alone?
expressions: Well, I prefer teamwork because you can share ideas and solve problems faster.
Actually, I am quite independent and work much better on my own.
To tell the truth, it depends on the project; sometimes alone is quicker.
That's a good question; a good team can achieve amazing things.
I would say teamwork is fun, but it can be frustrating if someone is lazy.

work_life.q: What was your first work experience?
work_life.re: Tell me about your first job.
expressions: Actually, I did some work experience in a local café last summer.
Well, I haven't had a real job yet, but I sometimes babysit my cousins.
To be honest, my first job was delivering newspapers, and it was hard work.
I suppose my first real experience was a school project organizing an event.
Let me think... I worked as a shop assistant, and it taught me patience.

work_life.q: How many hours should people work?
work_life.re: What is a good work schedule?
expressions: Well, I think the traditional eight-hour day is a bit too long.
Actually, a four-day working week sounds like a brilliant idea.
To tell the truth, it depends on the job, but nobody should work non-stop.
That's an interesting question; flexible working hours are definitely the future.
I would say thirty-five hours a week is plenty for a healthy life.

work_life.q: Do you like wearing a uniform?
expressions: Actually, I quite like it because you don't have to choose what to wear.
Well, I hate uniforms; I prefer to express my personality through clothes.
To be honest, a uniform looks very professional, but it can be uncomfortable.
I suppose it is good for certain jobs, like nurses or police officers.
Let me think... casual clothes are definitely much more comfortable.

work_life.re: What is a good manager like?
expressions: Well, a good manager should listen to their employees and be supportive.
Actually, clear communication and treating everyone fairly are the most important things.
To tell the truth, they need to be organized but also friendly and approachable.
That's a great question; a good boss encourages you to learn new skills.
I would say someone who doesn't micromanage everything you do.

work_life.q: Are robots going to take all jobs?
expressions: Actually, I think AI will take over dangerous or repetitive jobs.
Well, creative jobs and roles needing human empathy will always be safe.
To be honest, it is a bit worrying, but new types of jobs will be created.
I suppose technology changes everything, so we just have to adapt.
Let me think... they will help us, rather than completely replace us.

f: How often do you eat it?
expressions: Well, my absolute favourite food is traditional Italian pizza.
Actually, I love eating anything with chicken and rice.
To tell the truth, I have a sweet tooth, so chocolate is my favourite.
That's an easy question; a really good hamburger with chips.
Let me think... I could eat sushi every single day of the week.

food_cooking.q: Do you like cooking for others?
food_cooking.re: Do you cook for your family?
expressions: Actually, I really enjoy cooking dinner for my family on weekends.
Well, I am not a great cook, but I like baking cakes for my friends.
To be honest, I prefer eating to cooking, because cooking makes a mess.
I suppose I like it when people appreciate the meal I prepared.
Let me see... my signature dish is a spicy tomato pasta.

food_cooking.q: Is fast food popular in your country?
food_cooking.re: Do people eat much fast food?
expressions: Well, yes, unfortunately, there are fast food restaurants on every corner.
Actually, it is very popular with teenagers because it's cheap and quick.
To tell the truth, people eat it a lot when they are too busy to cook.
That's an interesting question; it is popular, but people know it is unhealthy.
I would say younger generations eat it much more than older people.

food_cooking.q: What is a traditional meal in your country?
food_cooking.re: Tell me about a local dish.
expressions: Actually, a very famous traditional dish is a rich meat stew with paprika.
Well, we have a delicious dessert made with sweet cheese and pastry.
To be honest, traditional food here usually contains a lot of meat and potatoes.
I suppose the most famous one is a hearty soup that takes hours to cook.
Let me think... we often eat a special type of cabbage roll at Christmas.

food_cooking.q: Do you prefer eating at home or out?
expressions: Well, I love eating out because you don't have to wash the dishes!
Actually, home-cooked food is usually much healthier and tastier.
To tell the truth, going to a restaurant is a nice treat for special occasions.
That's a good question; it depends on how tired I am in the evening.
I would say I prefer sitting in a cozy café with my friends.
Actually, I eat almost everything; I really like trying new flavours.
Well, I used to be very picky when I was a child, but not anymore.
To be honest, yes, there are quite a lot of vegetables I refuse to eat.
I suppose I am a bit difficult because I don't eat any seafood.
Let me think... I am adventurous with food, unless it is too spicy.

food_cooking.q: Is breakfast the most important meal?
expressions: Well, for me it is; I can't function properly without a good breakfast.
Actually, I often skip breakfast because I am not hungry in the morning.
To tell the truth, I only have time for a quick bowl of cereal.
That's an interesting question; scientists say it gives you energy for the day.
I would say a large cup of coffee is the most important part!
Actually, I love watching baking competitions; they are so relaxing.
Well, sometimes I watch short recipe videos on social media.
To be honest, I find cooking shows a bit boring.
I suppose it is fun to see professional chefs create amazing dishes.
Let me think... I sometimes try to copy the simple recipes at home.
Well, too much processed sugar is definitely bad for your teeth and body.
Actually, you need some sugar for energy, but from fruits, not sweets.
To tell the truth, I know it is unhealthy, but I am addicted to chocolate.
That's a great question; reducing sugar makes you feel much more energetic.
I would say the hidden sugar in fizzy drinks is the biggest problem.

food_cooking.re: Which fruit do you like best?
expressions: Actually, my favourite is definitely a sweet, juicy watermelon in the summer.
Well, I eat an apple or a banana every single day as a snack.
To be honest, I absolutely love strawberries, especially with a bit of cream.
I suppose exotic fruits like mango or pineapple are the most delicious.
Let me think... a cold bunch of grapes is perfectly refreshing.

culture_leisure.q: Do you like going to the cinema?
culture_leisure.re: How often do you go to movies?
expressions: Well, I absolutely love the atmosphere of watching a film on the big screen.
Actually, I rarely go nowadays because streaming services are so convenient.
To tell the truth, the cinema tickets and popcorn are quite expensive.
That's an interesting question; I go about once a month with my friends.
Let me think... I mostly go just to see big action or sci-fi blockbusters.

culture_leisure.q: What kind of music do you like?
expressions: Actually, I listen to a bit of everything, but mainly pop and rock.
Well, I am a huge fan of electronic dance music; it gives me energy.
To be honest, I really enjoy listening to classical music when I study.
I suppose indie bands are my favourite because the lyrics are very deep.
Let me see... rap and hip-hop are definitely the genres I listen to most.
Well, I find history museums fascinating, especially the ancient artifacts.
Actually, modern art galleries are great, but traditional museums can be boring.
To tell the truth, I only really go if it is a school trip.
That's a good question; interactive science museums are really good fun.
I would say I enjoy them if the exhibition is visually impressive.

culture_leisure.re: How much TV do you watch?
expressions: Actually, I don't watch traditional TV channels at all anymore.
Well, I am currently binge-watching a brilliant series on Netflix.
To be honest, I prefer watching short videos on YouTube instead.
I suppose I spend about an hour every evening watching a good show.
Let me think... I only turn the TV on to watch live sports events.

culture_leisure.re: Have you been to a concert?
expressions: Well, live music is incredible; the energy in the crowd is amazing.
Actually, I went to a festival last summer and it was an unforgettable experience.
To tell the truth, I find large concerts a bit too crowded and loud.
That's an interesting question; seeing my favourite band live was a dream come true.
I would say small, acoustic gigs in local cafes are the best.
Actually, I prefer books because you can use your imagination much more.
Well, films are better if you just want to relax for two hours.
To be honest, I rarely have the patience to sit and read a whole novel.
I suppose the book is almost always better than the film adaptation.
Let me think... both are great, but a good book stays with you longer.

culture_leisure.q: Do you go to the theater?
expressions: Well, seeing a live play is a very special and elegant experience.
Actually, I love watching big musicals with singing and dancing.
To tell the truth, the theatre isn't really my cup of tea; it feels a bit old-fashioned.
That's a great question; my school took us to see a Shakespeare play recently.
I would say it is wonderful, but unfortunately, the tickets cost a fortune.

culture_leisure.re: What do you do for fun?
expressions: Actually, my absolute favourite thing to do is photography.
Well, in my free time, I love baking all sorts of cakes and biscuits.
To be honest, gaming is my main hobby; I play online with my friends.
I suppose drawing and painting help me express my creativity.
Let me think... learning to play the guitar is my new favourite hobby.
Well, I follow a few actors and singers on social media.
Actually, I don't really care about celebrity gossip or their private lives.
To tell the truth, I admire athletes more than movie stars.
That's an interesting question; some celebrities use their fame for good causes.
I would say it is fun to read about them, but I wouldn't want to be famous.

culture_leisure.q: Is cultural life important in your city?
expressions: Actually, we have a fantastic summer festival every year.
Well, the city centre is always full of exhibitions and live music.
To be honest, it is quite a small town, so there isn't much going on.
I suppose cultural events bring the community together, which is important.
Let me think... we have a lovely local theatre and a modern library.

science_tech.q: Which technical device is most useful?
expressions: Well, the smartphone is definitely the most essential gadget we have.
Actually, I couldn't survive without my laptop for school work.
To tell the truth, wireless headphones are the best invention ever.
That's an interesting question; a smartwatch is incredibly useful for fitness.
Let me think... my tablet is perfect for both reading and watching films.

science_tech.q: Do you like science at school?
expressions: Actually, Biology is fascinating because you learn how the human body works.
Well, Physics is quite difficult for me, especially the complicated formulas.
To be honest, doing experiments in the Chemistry lab is always fun.
I suppose I prefer subjects like History or English over science.
Let me see... science is incredibly important for understanding our world.

science_tech.re: Are we too dependent on tech?
expressions: Well, in some ways yes, because we don't even need to leave the house to shop.
Actually, I think it makes us more efficient, not necessarily lazy.
To tell the truth, we rely on our phones too much to remember things.
That's a good question; GPS is great, but nobody can read a map anymore.
I would say technology does the hard work so we have more free time.

science_tech.q: What is the best invention ever?
expressions: Actually, the internet has completely changed how human beings communicate.
Well, the invention of electricity is obviously the foundation of modern life.
To be honest, vaccines and antibiotics have saved millions of lives.
I suppose the airplane, because it made the world so much smaller.
Let me think... the printing press was a huge step forward for education.

f: Is it a waste of time?
expressions: Well, I am a huge gamer; I love exploring massive open-world games.
Actually, I only play simple puzzle games on my phone when I am bored.
To tell the truth, I think they are a bit of a waste of time.
That's an interesting question; playing multiplayer games is very sociable.
I would say they improve your reaction times and problem-solving skills.

science_tech.re: What are the risks of apps?
expressions: Actually, it can be very bad for teenagers' mental health and self-esteem.
Well, cyberbullying is a huge problem that platforms need to fix.
To be honest, the biggest danger is fake news spreading incredibly fast.
I suppose it is safe if you are careful about your privacy settings.
Let me think... it is a powerful tool, but it can be highly addictive.
Well, with current technology, I think humans will definitely reach Mars soon.
Actually, I think we should fix the problems on Earth first.
To tell the truth, living on another planet sounds like a terrifying idea.
That's a great question; it would be an incredible scientific achievement.
I would say maybe in a hundred years, but certainly not in my lifetime.
Actually, there is a massive amount of false information on the web.
Well, you must always check the source before you believe an article.
To be honest, Wikipedia is usually quite accurate, but not 100% perfect.
I suppose critical thinking is the most important skill in the digital age.
Let me think... anyone can write anything online, so you have to be careful.

science_tech.q: Do you use AI for school?
expressions: Well, I sometimes use it to explain complex topics simply.
Actually, it is a brilliant tool for brainstorming ideas for essays.
To tell the truth, using it to write your homework is definitely cheating.
That's an interesting question; it is like having a private tutor 24/7.
I would say we need to learn how to use it responsibly.

science_tech.q: What tech will we have in 50 years?
expressions: Actually, I am convinced that all cars will be fully self-driving by then.
Well, virtual reality will probably be impossible to tell from real life.
To be honest, we might have robots doing all the housework for us.
I suppose medical nanotechnology will cure most major diseases.
Let me think... maybe artificial intelligence will be smarter than humans.

finance.q: Who manages money in your family?
expressions: Well, my parents usually sit down together to pay the bills.
Actually, my mum is much better at budgeting, so she handles it.
To tell the truth, we don't really discuss finances at the dinner table.
That's an interesting question; they manage it, but they teach me about saving.
Let me think... my dad keeps track of all the household expenses.

finance.re: Do you have your own money?
expressions: Actually, I get a small allowance every week if I do my chores.
Well, my parents transfer some money to my bank card every month.
To be honest, I only ask for money when I specifically need to buy something.
I suppose I spend most of my pocket money on snacks and cinema tickets.
Let me see... I try to save half of what I receive.

finance.q: Is it important to save money?
finance.re: Should we save for the future?
expressions: Well, it is absolutely crucial to have some savings for emergencies.
Actually, I am currently saving up to buy a new laptop.
To tell the truth, it is quite difficult to save when everything is so expensive.
That's a good question; developing a saving habit young is very smart.
I would say yes, because you never know what the future holds.
Actually, inflation has made basic things like food much more expensive.
Well, the cost of living seems to go up a little bit every single year.
To be honest, buying a house or a flat seems almost impossible for young people.
I suppose transport and energy bills take up a huge part of a budget.
Let me think... yes, going out to restaurants has become a real luxury.
Well, financial literacy should definitely be a mandatory subject in schools.
Actually, teenagers need to learn how taxes and bank loans work.
To tell the truth, many young adults leave school with no idea how to budget.
That's a great question; learning to manage debt is incredibly important.
I would say parents should also teach their kids the value of money early on.
Actually, I really enjoy buying new clothes, especially during the sales.
Well, I prefer online shopping because it is much more convenient.
To be honest, I hate crowded shopping centres, so I try to avoid them.
I suppose window shopping with friends is a fun way to spend an afternoon.
Let me think... I only go shopping when I absolutely need something new.

finance.q: Is money the most important thing?
expressions: Well, money gives you freedom and security, but health is definitely more important.
Actually, you can't buy genuine friendship or a happy family with money.
To tell the truth, poverty causes a lot of stress, so a basic income is vital.
That's a deep question; money solves practical problems, but not emotional ones.
I would say experiences and memories matter much more than material wealth.

finance.q: Do you use a bank card?
expressions: Actually, I use my smartphone or contactless card to pay for almost everything.
Well, I hardly ever carry cash anymore; cards are just so much easier.
To be honest, I think paying with cash helps you realize how much you are spending.
I suppose cash will eventually disappear completely in the next ten years.
Let me think... using a banking app helps me track my expenses perfectly.

finance.q: What would you buy if you were rich?
expressions: Well, the very first thing I would do is travel around the entire world.
Actually, I would buy a huge house for my parents so they could relax.
To tell the truth, I would probably invest most of the money to be secure.
That's an interesting question; I would definitely donate a large amount to charity.
I would say I would buy a fast sports car, just for fun!

finance.q: Is it okay to borrow money?
expressions: Actually, borrowing money from friends can easily ruin a good relationship.
Well, taking out a student loan is often necessary to get a university degree.
To be honest, buying things on credit is dangerous if you can't afford the repayments.
I suppose a mortgage is the only loan that really makes financial sense.
Let me think... you should always live within your means and avoid debt.
